original_statement: does sandy bay or blue hill have a larger population?
mutated_statement: does a coastal area or an inland district have a larger population, and must it also be shown to have a smaller population?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Added conjunctive constraint/contradiction + Modal requirement: Specific proper nouns replaced by generic geographic categories | A new conjunctive clause adds a "must it also be shown to have a smaller population" requirement, creating a contradictory/extra verification condition (Sandy Bay/Blue Hill → a coastal area/an inland district)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought与critique可识别关键信息：初始judge_thought指出预测为空但给出基于2008数据的比较结论，tree_and_critic的critique也仅批评缺乏步骤并未指出指令内在矛盾。agent在after_refine中直接以表中人口数据回答“内陆区较大，沿海区较小”，且没有声明或质疑“必须同时被证明更小”这一矛盾模态要求。具体表现为：未向用户澄清矛盾、未拒绝不可同时满足的要求、也未在推理中标注矛盾点，直接忽略矛盾部分并按可行子集完成任务。因此归类为“无视所有矛盾指令”。
